home.description: F.O.C.U.S. is a computer-based visual attention task designed to examine how users track and respond to ongoing visual cues presented at a fixed pace.

duration.title: Assessment Duration
duration.text: The assessment takes approximately {{duration}} minutes to complete.

instructions.text: During this time, you will see alternating visual stimuli and should respond by pressing the button or key when the target stimulus appears.

test.instructions: Press the button when you see the TARGET square

page.title: F.O.C.U.S. Assessment
page.description: F.O.C.U.S. (Following Ongoing Cues Under Structure) is a visual attention task that measures how consistently a user responds to structured cues and how effectively they withhold responses when required.
page.respondTarget: Left-click or press the spacebar when the target stimulus appears
page.noRespondNonTarget: Do not respond to non-target stimuli
page.precision: High-precision timing captures your response accuracy
page.seeClearly: Ensure you can see the screen clearly
page.useEither: You may use either mouse click or spacebar
page.cannotPause: The assessment cannot be paused once started

results.title: Your Results
results.copyError: Unable to copy to clipboard. Please manually select and copy the text.

acs.noNormativeData: No normative data available for this age/gender combination. ACS cannot be calculated.

validity.title: Assessment Validity
validity.invalid: Invalid Assessment - Too many anticipatory responses

emailForm.title: Receive Your Results
emailForm.description: Konsulin will provide secure access to your results through email

consent.text: I consent to receive my assessment results at this email address. My email will be securely processed and deleted after results are sent. Data is retained for 7 days unless successfully transmitted.

emailForm.gdpr: Your data is protected under GDPR regulations.

timing.title: Timing Settings
timing.configDescription: Configure test parameters for the F.O.C.U.S. assessment.
timing.totalTrialsDescription: Must be an even number for balanced two-half test design
timing.oddValuesRounded: Odd values are rounded up to {{value}}

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Manage local test data and upload settings.

about.title: About F.O.C.U.S.
about.description: F.O.C.U.S. (Following Ongoing Cues Under Structure) is a visual attention assessment designed for clinical and research settings.
about.focusDescription: The Following Ongoing Cues Under Structure (F.O.C.U.S.) is a computerized visual continuous performance test used to assess attention and inhibitory control. It is adapted from T.O.V.A. manual, which is widely used in the diagnosis and monitoring of attention disorders such as ADHD. F.O.C.U.S. is intended as a research tool to standardize the assessment of attention using an open-source platform.
about.focusMetrics: The test measures four key variables: Response Time, Response Time Variability, Commission Errors (false alarms), and Omission Errors (missed targets).
about.supportText: For technical support or questions about the F.O.C.U.S. Assessment, please contact your healthcare provider or system administrator.

confirm.deleteSingle: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
confirm.deleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} sessions?
confirm.clearCache: Are you sure you want to clear all local cached data?
